overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket walking through a heavily foggy deserted suburban street, passing beneath a concrete overpass labeled 'JACKS INN', and entering a dimly lit motel room where a mysterious figure appears.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy suburban street with utility poles and chain-link fences

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy street past utility poles and chain-link fences

entered.detail: wooden utility poles with multiple cross-arms and wires
metal chain-link fencing running along the sidewalk
bright yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk
cracked asphalt street with faded white lines

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a desolate foggy street lined with utility poles and chain-link fences. The visibility is extremely low due to heavy fog, and the street is completely empty of vehicles or pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: area beneath the Jacks Inn concrete overpass

events.description: character walks under the concrete overpass entering a semi-covered area
character exits the overpass back into the open foggy courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass and emerging into the motel courtyard area

entered.detail: concrete overpass with JACKS INN painted in large letters on the side
metal staircase with railings leading to upper motel level
hanging decorative lights beneath the overpass

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes beneath a concrete overpass marked with 'JACKS INN' graffiti. The area briefly becomes darker and more enclosed before opening up into a motel courtyard with exterior staircases.

scene_state.functional_zone: motel covered porch and entrance area

events.description: character opens the motel room door and enters the building

agents.ego_description: walking across the courtyard toward the motel room door and entering the building

entered.detail: single-story motel building with wooden porch columns and stone foundation
dark red door with silver handle and room number plaque
structural wooden columns supporting the porch roof

segments.scene_description: The character walks across the motel courtyard toward a ground-floor room. The building features a covered porch with wooden pillars, and the character approaches and opens the door to enter.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit motel room interior with vintage furniture

events.description: lighting shifts from natural foggy daylight to dim warm artificial lamplight
a mysterious figure in pink clothing appears standing near the window

agents.ego_description: entering the room and looking around at the bed, furniture, and walls, then noticing a figure standing in the corner

notable_agents.action: standing motionless near the window wearing pink clothing

entered.detail: double bed with patterned bedspread and wooden headboard
lit table lamp with fabric shade providing warm ambient light
framed landscape painting hanging above the bed
dark wooden ceiling fan with light fixture

segments.scene_description: Inside the dimly lit motel room, the warm glow of a bedside lamp reveals a simple interior with a bed, chair, and framed artwork. As the character explores the space, a mysterious figure in pink clothing becomes visible standing near the window, creating a tense atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, fog-shrouded street into the claustrophobic interior of a dimly lit motel room. It begins by trailing a character through a heavy mist lined with utility poles and chain-link fences, where visibility is severely limited. As the character moves forward, the scene passes beneath the dark, enclosed concrete of an overpass marked with JACKS INN graffiti before opening up into a motel courtyard with exterior staircases. The camera then follows the character across the courtyard and under a covered porch with wooden pillars, transitioning from the outdoor grayness as they open the door to a room. Finally, the environment shifts to a warm, lamp-lit interior where the exploration of the simple room reveals a mysterious figure in pink clothing standing by the window.
